title: symphyotrichum bracei
intro: Symphyotrichum bracei, also known as the Apache plume, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Symphyotrichum bracei include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
